_comment: Copy this file to 'user_options.json' (same folder) to add your own choices. They survive updates. Reload the node or restart ComfyUI to apply.
_comment_fields: 'fields' extends any dropdown EXCEPT gender, hair_color_scope, location_setting, outfit_style and outfit_description.
_comment_outfits: 'outfits' adds whole new outfit_style choices WITH their garment text (the proper way to extend outfit_style). Buckets: unisex (always eligible) plus female/male (picked by the wardrobe control). Any subset is fine; a style with no usable text is skipped.

unisex: a sleek white EVA suit with a mirrored gold visor and magnetic boots
female: a form-fitting flight suit with a utility harness and grav boots
male: a bulky pressurized exosuit with chest controls and a domed helmet

unisex: weathered plate armor over chainmail with a tattered cloak and steel gauntlets
